title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
